headline: Seaport says GE Aerospace selloff is a buying opportunity
summary: Investing.com -- Seaport Research Partners initiated coverage on GE Aerospace with a Buy rating and a $375 price target, arguing that recent weakness in the aerospace giant’s shares presents an attractive entry point for investors betting on a longer-lasting aviation aftermarket boom.
